channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] How Tampa General's Aeromed helicopter gets critical patients to the hospital faster than an ambulance
item.description: When two Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office deputies were shot in the line of duty on July 16, they were taken to Tampa General Hospital by helicopter.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian goods, citing disputes over autos, alcohol
item.description: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump orders 10th consecutive night of strikes on Iran in push to reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Donald Trump has ordered a 10th consecutive night of U.S. strikes on Iran as the conflict over the Strait of Hormuz continues to escalate.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Emergency wastewater repairs to close lanes on Bayshore Boulevard in Tampa
item.description: A large cave-in above a wastewater mainline will close two lanes on Bayshore Boulevard in Tampa beginning Tuesday, affecting traffic between Brorein Street and Platt Street.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Pacific Rim restaurant owner vows to rebuild after blaze
item.description: A fire heavily damaged Pacific Rim, a staple Sarasota restaurant on Hillview Street, leaving its owners determined to rebuild after nearly 30 years in business.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] BREAKING: Crash on I-75 creates big delays amidst Monday p.m. rush

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 5 dead after group enters Ohio river to help struggling swimmer
item.description: Five people have died on a river in Ohio after several of them went into the water to help another person who was struggling to swim, authorities said Monday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Darline Graham to run for late brother Lindsey Graham's South Carolina Senate seat
item.description: Sen. Darline Graham announced that she will run for her late brother’s seat this November, after being appointed last week to serve out the rest of Lindsey Graham’s term.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Back-to-School Tax-Free Holiday begins, financial expert offers advice
item.description: Back-to-school shopping can be expensive, but now relief is available. We have officially entered the Back-to-School Sales Tax Holiday in the state of Florida, running now through August 20.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] America's national parks are facing a steep repair bill of roughly $24 billion
item.description: America's national parks are facing a steep repair bill of roughly $24 billion. This includes costs for aging roads, trails and bridges and in many cases, these repairs have been delayed for years.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Byron Donalds challenges David Jolly to 3 Florida governor debates
item.description: Republican gubernatorial candidate Byron Donalds is calling for three statewide debates with Democrat David Jolly ahead of Florida’s general election campaign.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Sarasota police asking for public's help after shooting at youth football event at Booker HS
item.description: Sarasota police are investigating as shooting that happened during a youth football event at Booker High School on July 18.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida ranks in top 15 of 'Best School Systems' in the U.S.: WalletHub
item.description: A new study from WalletHub names Florida in the top 15 "Best School Systems" in the nation. According to WalletHub, Florida ranks 13 in the top 15 best school systems in the U.S.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Rev. Al Sharpton offers $50K reward for new information into Nolan Wells death
item.description: Family and supporters of Nolan Xavier Wells gathered in a Mississippi church Monday to mourn and celebrate the 18-year-old, whose death following a July 4 boat trip with friends has captured national attention.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Police warn of scammers impersonating school sports teams
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Florida officials monitoring tropical disturbance, expect no major emergency
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota native Naarai Jacobs featured on new Rolling Stones album

[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Fort Myers federal judge died before congressman moved to impeach him
[The Florida Channel] 7/20/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Article V Revenues
item.description: 7/20/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Article V Revenues first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/20/26 Revenue Estimating Conference: Article V Revenues first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] State Department issues warning for Americans traveling or living abroad as Iran conflict escalates
item.description: The State Department issued a warning on Saturday to all Americans traveling or living abroad due to "heightened tensions" in the Middle East.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man arrested, charged for abusing dog in Hillsborough County: HCSO
item.description: The Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office (HCSO) said a man was arrested and charged after witnesses reported seeing him abuse his dog.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] People are making wildfire bets on prediction markets. Experts say it could lead to disaster
item.description: Some prediction markets also allow people to bet on wildfires, as well as other climate change-fueled extreme weather events — an issue previously reported by High Country News.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] West Pasco girls softball league hosting Dixie Softball World Series
item.description: West Pasco players are competing in the Dixie Softball World Series for the last time after 15 years together — including one who beat cancer at age 3.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Judge temporarily blocks Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger
item.description: A federal judge on Monday temporarily blocked Paramount's proposed merger with Warner Bros. Discovery.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] WTA introduces gene testing for all players on women's tennis tour
item.description: The Women’s Tennis Association is introducing one-off mandatory gene-testing for all players effective from Tuesday – a requirement to compete at the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Colombian man accused of DUI at 101 mph on I-4 now faces ICE hold: PCSO
item.description: A Colombian man who deputies say is in the United States illegally was arrested Saturday after allegedly driving more than 100 mph while impaired on Interstate 4 in Polk County, according to the Polk County Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] ABC7’s Linda Carson turns 88!
